step.name: schedule
step.action: Schedule postmortem within 5 business days; assign independent facilitator.

step.name: reconstruct-timeline
step.action: Build evidence-anchored timeline; each event has URL.

step.name: contributing-factors
step.action: Facilitate factor tree; capture ≥3 factors; no root-cause framing.

step.name: action-items
step.action: Define ≥1 action per factor; owner, deadline, verifier per item.

step.name: language-lint
step.action: Run language lint; iterate until pass.

step.name: publish
step.action: Publish internal within 7 days; redacted external if needed.
